function Tq(e, t) {
    switch (t.type) {
    case "SET_USER":
        return {
            ...e,
            currentUser: t.payload
        };
    case "SET_AUTHENTICATED":
        return {
            ...e,
            isAuthenticated: t.payload
        };
    case "SET_ROLE":
        return {
            ...e,
            selectedRole: t.payload
        };
    case "SET_PATIENTS":
        return {
            ...e,
            patients: t.payload
        };
    case "SELECT_PATIENT":
        return {
            ...e,
            selectedPatientId: t.payload
        };
    case "ADD_PATIENT":
        return {
            ...e,
            patients: [...e.patients, t.payload],
            selectedPatientId: t.payload.patient.id
        };
    case "UPDATE_PATIENT":
        return {
            ...e,
            patients: e.patients.map(a => a.patient.id === t.payload.patientId ? {
                ...a,
                ...t.payload.data
            } : a)
        };
    case "REMOVE_PATIENT":
        return {
            ...e,
            patients: e.patients.filter(a => a.patient.id !== t.payload),
            selectedPatientId: e.selectedPatientId === t.payload ? e.patients.find(a => a.patient.id !== t.payload)?.patient.id || null : e.selectedPatientId
        };
    case "SET_CAREGIVER_SETTINGS":
        return {
            ...e,
            caregiverSettings: {
                ...e.caregiverSettings,
                ...t.payload
            }
        };
    case "SET_PATIENT":
        return {
            ...e,
            patient: t.payload
        };
    case "SET_TASKS":
        return {
            ...e,
            tasks: t.payload
        };
    case "UPDATE_TASK":
        return {
            ...e,
            tasks: e.tasks.map(a => a.id === t.payload.id ? t.payload : a)
        };
    case "SET_MEDICATIONS":
        return {
            ...e,
            medications: t.payload
        };
    case "ADD_MEDICATION":
        return {
            ...e,
            medications: [...e.medications, t.payload]
        };
    case "SET_MEDICATION_LOGS":
        return {
            ...e,
            medicationLogs: t.payload
        };
    case "ADD_MEDICATION_LOG":
        return {
            ...e,
            medicationLogs: [t.payload, ...e.medicationLogs]
        };
    case "SET_MOOD_ENTRIES":
        return {
            ...e,
            moodEntries: t.payload
        };
    case "ADD_MOOD_ENTRY":
        return {
            ...e,
            moodEntries: [t.payload, ...e.moodEntries]
        };
    case "SET_BEHAVIOR_LOGS":
        return {
            ...e,
            behaviorLogs: t.payload
        };
    case "ADD_BEHAVIOR_LOG":
        return {
            ...e,
            behaviorLogs: [t.payload, ...e.behaviorLogs]
        };
    case "SET_MEMORIES":
        return {
            ...e,
            memories: t.payload
        };
    case "ADD_MEMORY":
        return {
            ...e,
            memories: [t.payload, ...e.memories]
        };
    case "SET_DOCUMENTS":
        return {
            ...e,
            documents: t.payload
        };
    case "ADD_DOCUMENT":
        return {
            ...e,
            documents: [...e.documents, t.payload]
        };
    case "SET_ACTIVITIES":
        return {
            ...e,
            activities: t.payload
        };
    case "ADD_ACTIVITY_SESSION":
        return {
            ...e,
            activitySessions: [t.payload, ...e.activitySessions]
        };
    case "SET_CARE_TEAM":
        return {
            ...e,
            careTeam: t.payload
        };
    case "SET_REMINDERS":
        return {
            ...e,
            reminders: t.payload
        };
    case "ADD_REMINDER":
        return {
            ...e,
            reminders: [...e.reminders, t.payload]
        };
    case "SET_VITAL_SIGNS":
        return {
            ...e,
            vitalSigns: t.payload
        };
    case "SET_SLEEP_ENTRIES":
        return {
            ...e,
            sleepEntries: t.payload
        };
    case "SET_APPOINTMENTS":
        return {
            ...e,
            appointments: t.payload
        };
    case "SET_GOALS":
        return {
            ...e,
            goals: t.payload
        };
    case "SET_DASHBOARD_STATS":
        return {
            ...e,
            dashboardStats: t.payload
        };
    case "SET_ALERTS":
        return {
            ...e,
            alerts: t.payload
        };
    case "MARK_ALERT_READ":
        return {
            ...e,
            alerts: e.alerts.map(a => a.id === t.payload ? {
                ...a,
                isRead: !0
            } : a)
        };
    case "SET_SAFETY_ALERTS":
        return {
            ...e,
            safetyAlerts: t.payload
        };
    case "SET_ADL_ASSESSMENTS":
        return {
            ...e,
            adlAssessments: t.payload
        };
    case "SET_CAREGIVER_STATUS":
        return {
            ...e,
            caregiverStatus: t.payload
        };
    case "SET_NUTRITION_LOGS":
        return {
            ...e,
            nutritionLogs: t.payload
        };
    case "SET_LOADING":
        return {
            ...e,
            isLoading: t.payload
        };
    case "SET_ERROR":
        return {
            ...e,
            error: t.payload
        };
    case "SET_VIEW":
        return {
            ...e,
            currentView: t.payload
        };
    case "TOGGLE_SIDEBAR":
        return {
            ...e,
            sidebarOpen: !e.sidebarOpen
        };
    case "SET_DEMO_MODE":
        return {
            ...e,
            isDemoMode: t.payload
        };
    case "LOGOUT":
        return mL;
    default:
        return e
    }
}

        m
    }
    ;
    return i = c,
    (...u) => i(rV(...u))
}
  , sV = []
  , ua = e => {
    const t = a => a[e] || sV;
    return t.isThemeGetter = !0,
    t
}
  , _L = /^\[(?:(\w[\w-]*):)?(.+)\]$/i
  , CL = /^\((?:(\w[\w-]*):)?(.+)\)$/i
  , iV = /^\d+(?:\.\d+)?\/\d+(?:\.\d+)?$/

  , bi = e => iV.test(e)

function Vm(e=Ft.visualDuration, t=Ft.bounce) {

class KZ {
    constructor() {}
    static detectEnvironment() {
        var t;
        if (typeof WebSocket < "u")
            return {
                type: "native",
                constructor: WebSocket
            };
        if (typeof globalThis < "u" && typeof globalThis.WebSocket < "u")
            return {
                type: "native",
                constructor: globalThis.WebSocket
            };
        if (typeof global < "u" && typeof global.WebSocket < "u")
            return {
                type: "native",
                constructor: global.WebSocket
            };
        if (typeof globalThis < "u" && typeof globalThis.WebSocketPair < "u" && typeof globalThis.WebSocket > "u")
            return {
                type: "cloudflare",
                error: "Cloudflare Workers detected. WebSocket clients are not supported in Cloudflare Workers.",
                workaround: "Use Cloudflare Workers WebSocket API for server-side WebSocket handling, or deploy to a different runtime."
            };
        if (typeof globalThis < "u" && globalThis.EdgeRuntime || typeof navigator < "u" && (!((t = navigator.userAgent) === null || t === void 0) && t.includes("Vercel-Edge")))
            return {
                type: "unsupported",
                error: "Edge runtime detected (Vercel Edge/Netlify Edge). WebSockets are not supported in edge functions.",
                workaround: "Use serverless functions or a different deployment target for WebSocket functionality."
            };
        const a = globalThis.process;
        if (a) {
            const r = a.versions;
            if (r && r.node) {
                const n = r.node
                  , i = parseInt(n.replace(/^v/, "").split(".")[0]);
                return i >= 22 ? typeof globalThis.WebSocket < "u" ? {
                    type: "native",
                    constructor: globalThis.WebSocket
                } : {
                    type: "unsupported",
                    error: `Node.js ${i} detected but native WebSocket not found.`,
                    workaround: "Provide a WebSocket implementation via the transport option."
                } : {
                    type: "unsupported",
                    error: `Node.js ${i} detected without native WebSocket support.`,
                    workaround: `For Node.js < 22, install "ws" package and provide it via the transport option:
import ws from "ws"
new RealtimeClient(url, { transport: ws })`
                }
            }
        }
        return {
            type: "unsupported",
            error: "Unknown JavaScript runtime without WebSocket support.",
            workaround: "Ensure you're running in a supported environment (browser, Node.js, Deno) or provide a custom WebSocket implementation."
        }
    }
    static getWebSocketConstructor() {
        const t = this.detectEnvironment();
        if (t.constructor)
            return t.constructor;
        let a = t.error || "WebSocket not supported in this environment.";
        throw t.workaround && (a += `

Suggested solution: ${t.workaround}`),
        new Error(a)
    }
    static createWebSocket(t, a) {
        const r = this.getWebSocketConstructor();
        return new r(t,a)
    }
    static isWebSocketSupported() {
        try {
            const t = this.detectEnvironment();
            return t.type === "native" || t.type === "ws"
        } catch {
            return !1
        }
    }
}

class tJ {
    constructor(t) {
        this.HEADER_LENGTH = 1,
        this.USER_BROADCAST_PUSH_META_LENGTH = 6,
        this.KINDS = {
            userBroadcastPush: 3,
            userBroadcast: 4
        },
        this.BINARY_ENCODING = 0,
        this.JSON_ENCODING = 1,
        this.BROADCAST_EVENT = "broadcast",
        this.allowedMetadataKeys = [],
        this.allowedMetadataKeys = t ?? []
    }
    encode(t, a) {

    _binaryEncodeUserBroadcastPush(t) {

    _encodeBinaryUserBroadcastPush(t) {

    _encodeJsonUserBroadcastPush(t) {

          , c = new TextEncoder().encode(JSON.stringify(n)).buffer;

    }
    _encodeUserBroadcastPush(t, a, r) {

          , d = (n = t.ref) !== null && n !== void 0 ? n : ""
          , u = (i = t.join_ref) !== null && i !== void 0 ? i : ""
          , h = t.payload.event
          , m = this.allowedMetadataKeys ? this._pick(t.payload, this.allowedMetadataKeys) : {}
          , f = Object.keys(m).length === 0 ? "" : JSON.stringify(m);
        if (u.length > 255)

        if (d.length > 255)

            throw new Error(`topic length ${c.length} exceeds maximum of 255`);
        if (h.length > 255)
            throw new Error(`userEvent length ${h.length} exceeds maximum of 255`);
        if (f.length > 255)
            throw new Error(`metadata length ${f.length} exceeds maximum of 255`);
        const x = this.USER_BROADCAST_PUSH_META_LENGTH + u.length + d.length + c.length + h.length + f.length
          , v = new ArrayBuffer(this.HEADER_LENGTH + x);

          , y = 0;

        j.setUint8(y++, h.length),
        j.setUint8(y++, f.length),
        j.setUint8(y++, a),
        Array.from(u, N => j.setUint8(y++, N.charCodeAt(0))),
        Array.from(d, N => j.setUint8(y++, N.charCodeAt(0))),
        Array.from(c, N => j.setUint8(y++, N.charCodeAt(0))),
        Array.from(h, N => j.setUint8(y++, N.charCodeAt(0))),
        Array.from(f, N => j.setUint8(y++, N.charCodeAt(0)));
        var b = new Uint8Array(v.byteLength + r.byteLength);
        return b.set(new Uint8Array(v), 0),
        b.set(new Uint8Array(r), v.byteLength),
        b.buffer
    }
    decode(t, a) {
        if (this._isArrayBuffer(t)) {
            let r = this._binaryDecode(t);
            return a(r)
        }
        if (typeof t == "string") {
            const r = JSON.parse(t)
              , [n,i,c,d,u] = r;
            return a({
                join_ref: n,
                ref: i,
                topic: c,
                event: d,
                payload: u
            })
        }
        return a({})
    }
    _binaryDecode(t) {
        const a = new DataView(t)
          , r = a.getUint8(0)
          , n = new TextDecoder;
        if (r === this.KINDS.userBroadcast)
            return this._decodeUserBroadcast(t, a, n)
    }
    _decodeUserBroadcast(t, a, r) {
        const n = a.getUint8(1)
          , i = a.getUint8(2)
          , c = a.getUint8(3)
          , d = a.getUint8(4);
        let u = this.HEADER_LENGTH + 4;
        const h = r.decode(t.slice(u, u + n));
        u = u + n;
        const m = r.decode(t.slice(u, u + i));
        u = u + i;
        const f = r.decode(t.slice(u, u + c));
        u = u + c;
        const x = t.slice(u, t.byteLength)
          , v = d === this.JSON_ENCODING ? JSON.parse(r.decode(x)) : x
          , j = {
            type: this.BROADCAST_EVENT,
            event: m,
            payload: v
        };
        return c > 0 && (j.meta = JSON.parse(f)),
        {
            join_ref: null,
            ref: null,
            topic: h,
            event: this.BROADCAST_EVENT,
            payload: j
        }
    }
    _isArrayBuffer(t) {
        var a;
        return t instanceof ArrayBuffer || ((a = t?.constructor) === null || a === void 0 ? void 0 : a.name) === "ArrayBuffer"
    }
    _pick(t, a) {
        return !t || typeof t != "object" ? {} : Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(t).filter( ([r]) => a.includes(r)))
    }
}

class zb {

        this.refEvent = null
    }
    resend(t) {

        this._cancelRefEvent(),
        this.ref = "",
        this.refEvent = null,
        this.receivedResp = null,

    }
    send() {

        this.sent = !0,
        this.channel.socket.push({
            topic: this.channel.topic,
            event: this.event,
            payload: this.payload,
            ref: this.ref,
            join_ref: this.channel._joinRef()
        }))
    }
    updatePayload(t) {

    }
    receive(t, a) {

        this.recHooks.push({
            status: t,
            callback: a
        }),

    }

            return;

        this.refEvent = this.channel._replyEventName(this.ref);

            this._cancelRefEvent(),
            this._cancelTimeout(),
            this.receivedResp = a,
            this._matchReceive(a)
        }
        ;

            this.trigger("timeout", {})

        , this.timeout)
    }

        this.refEvent && this.channel._trigger(this.refEvent, {
            status: t,
            response: a
        })
    }
    destroy() {
        this._cancelRefEvent(),
        this._cancelTimeout()
    }

    }

    static syncState(t, a, r, n) {

        }

    }
    static syncDiff(t, a, r, n) {

            leaves: this.transformState(a.leaves)
        };

                n("ok")
            }
            ).receive("timeout", () => {
                a(),
                n("timed out")
            }
            ).receive("error", () => {
                n("error")
            }
            ),
            r.send(),
            this._canPush() || r.trigger("ok", {})
        }
        ).finally( () => {
            r?.destroy()
        }
        )
    }
    teardown() {
        this.pushBuffer.forEach(t => t.destroy()),
        this.pushBuffer = [],
        this.rejoinTimer.reset(),
        this.joinPush.destroy(),
        this.state = ma.closed,
        this.bindings = {}
    }
    async _fetchWithTimeout(t, a, r) {

          , i = setTimeout( () => n.abort(), r)
          , c = await this.socket.fetch(t, Object.assign(Object.assign({}, a), {

        }));

    _push(t, a, r=this.timeout) {

        let n = new zb(this,t,a,r);
        return this._canPush() ? n.send() : this._addToPushBuffer(n),
        n

        }
    }

        return a
    }
    _isMember(t) {
        return this.topic === t
    }
    _joinRef() {
        return this.joinPush.ref
    }
    _trigger(t, a, r) {

          , {close: d, error: u, leave: h, join: m} = xn;
        if (r && [d, u, h, m].indexOf(c) >= 0 && r !== this._joinRef())
            return;

            throw "channel onMessage callbacks must return the payload, modified or unmodified";

                }

    }
    _isClosed() {
        return this.state === ma.closed
    }
    _isJoined() {
        return this.state === ma.joined
    }
    _isJoining() {

    }
    _isLeaving() {

    }

            type: n,
            filter: a,
            callback: r
        };

        this
    }
    _off(t, a) {

            var i;
            return !(((i = n.type) === null || i === void 0 ? void 0 : i.toLocaleLowerCase()) === r && Cl.isEqual(n.filter, a))
        }
        )),
        this
    }
    static isEqual(t, a) {
        if (Object.keys(t).length !== Object.keys(a).length)
            return !1;
        for (const r in t)
            if (t[r] !== a[r])
                return !1;
        return !0
    }
    static isFilterValueEqual(t, a) {
        return (t ?? void 0) === (a ?? void 0)
    }
    _rejoinUntilConnected() {
        this.rejoinTimer.scheduleTimeout(),
        this.socket.isConnected() && this._rejoin()
    }
    _onClose(t) {
        this._on(xn.close, {}, t)
    }
    _onError(t) {

    }
    _canPush() {
        return this.socket.isConnected() && this._isJoined()
    }
    _rejoin(t=this.timeout) {
        this._isLeaving() || (this.socket._leaveOpenTopic(this.topic),
        this.state = ma.joining,
        this.joinPush.resend(t))
    }

        (t.type === "UPDATE" || t.type === "DELETE") && (a.old = v5(t.columns, t.old_record)),

    _triggerStateCallbacks(t, a) {

        this.vsn = (u = t?.vsn) !== null && u !== void 0 ? u : x5,

        this.vsn) {

            this.decode = (f = t?.decode) !== null && f !== void 0 ? f : ( (j, y) => y(JSON.parse(j)));

            this.decode = (v = t?.decode) !== null && v !== void 0 ? v : this.serializer.decode.bind(this.serializer);
            break;
        default:
            throw new Error(`Unsupported serializer version: ${this.vsn}`)
        }
        if (this.worker) {
            if (typeof window < "u" && !window.Worker)
                throw new Error("Web Worker is not supported");
            this.workerUrl = t?.workerUrl
        }
    }

var yh = class extends Error {
    constructor(e, t) {
        super(e),
        this.name = "IcebergError",
        this.status = t.status,
        this.icebergType = t.icebergType,
        this.icebergCode = t.icebergCode,
        this.details = t.details,
        this.isCommitStateUnknown = t.icebergType === "CommitStateUnknownException" || [500, 502, 504].includes(t.status) && t.icebergType?.includes("CommitState") === !0
    }
    isNotFound() {
        return this.status === 404
    }
    isConflict() {
        return this.status === 409
    }
    isAuthenticationTimeout() {
        return this.status === 419
    }
}

function eQ(e, t, a) {

            return

                cause: e
            })

            })

            })

                webauthn: {
                    rpId: a,
                    rpOrigins: r,
                    type: u.webauthn.type,
                    credential_response: u.webauthn.credential_response
                }
            }) : {
                data: null,
                error: h
            }
        } catch (c) {
            return Me(c) ? {
                data: null,
                error: c
            } : {
                data: null,
                error: new $o("Unexpected error in register",c)
            }
        }
    }
}

    async _exchangeCodeForSession(t) {

    async _acquireLock(t, a) {
        this._debug("#_acquireLock", "begin", t);
        try {
            if (this.lockAcquired) {
                const r = this.pendingInLock.length ? this.pendingInLock[this.pendingInLock.length - 1] : Promise.resolve()
                  , n = (async () => (await r,
                await a()))();
                return this.pendingInLock.push((async () => {
                    try {
                        await n
                    } catch {}
                }
                )()),
                n
            }
            return await this.lock(`lock:${this.storageKey}`, t, async () => {
                this._debug("#_acquireLock", "lock acquired for storage key", this.storageKey);
                try {
                    this.lockAcquired = !0;
                    const r = a();
                    for (this.pendingInLock.push((async () => {
                        try {
                            await r
                        } catch {}
                    }
                    )()),
                    await r; this.pendingInLock.length; ) {
                        const n = [...this.pendingInLock];
                        await Promise.all(n),
                        this.pendingInLock.splice(0, n.length)
                    }
                    return await r
                } finally {
                    this._debug("#_acquireLock", "lock released for storage key", this.storageKey),
                    this.lockAcquired = !1
                }
            }
            )
        } finally {
            this._debug("#_acquireLock", "end")
        }
    }
    async _useSession(t) {
        this._debug("#_useSession", "begin");
        try {
            const a = await this.__loadSession();
            return await t(a)
        } finally {
            this._debug("#_useSession", "end")
        }
    }
    async __loadSession() {
        this._debug("#__loadSession()", "begin"),
        this.lockAcquired || this._debug("#__loadSession()", "used outside of an acquired lock!", new Error().stack);
        try {
            let t = null;
            const a = await Ao(this.storage, this.storageKey);
            if (this._debug("#getSession()", "session from storage", a),
            a !== null && (this._isValidSession(a) ? t = a : (this._debug("#getSession()", "session from storage is not valid"),
            await this._removeSession())),
            !t)
                return {
                    data: {
                        session: null
                    },
                    error: null
                };
            const r = t.expires_at ? t.expires_at * 1e3 - Date.now() < Ub : !1;
            if (this._debug("#__loadSession()", `session has${r ? "" : " not"} expired`, "expires_at", t.expires_at),
            !r) {
                if (this.userStorage) {
                    const c = await Ao(this.userStorage, this.storageKey + "-user");
                    c?.user ? t.user = c.user : t.user = Vb()
                }
                if (this.storage.isServer && t.user && !t.user.__isUserNotAvailableProxy) {
                    const c = {
                        value: this.suppressGetSessionWarning
                    };
                    t.user = xQ(t.user, c),
                    c.value && (this.suppressGetSessionWarning = !0)
                }
                return {
                    data: {
                        session: t
                    },
                    error: null
                }
            }
            const {data: n, error: i} = await this._callRefreshToken(t.refresh_token);
            return i ? this._returnResult({
                data: {
                    session: null
                },
                error: i
            }) : this._returnResult({
                data: {
                    session: n
                },
                error: null
            })
        } finally {
            this._debug("#__loadSession()", "end")
        }
    }

        a
    }

    async setSession(t) {
        return await this.initializePromise,

    }
    async _setSession(t) {
        try {
            if (!t.access_token || !t.refresh_token)
                throw new _r;
            const a = Date.now() / 1e3;
            let r = a
              , n = !0
              , i = null;
            const {payload: c} = rm(t.access_token);
            if (c.exp && (r = c.exp,
            n = r <= a),
            n) {
                const {data: d, error: u} = await this._callRefreshToken(t.refresh_token);
                if (u)
                    return this._returnResult({
                        data: {
                            user: null,
                            session: null
                        },
                        error: u
                    });
                if (!d)
                    return {
                        data: {
                            user: null,
                            session: null
                        },
                        error: null
                    };
                i = d
            } else {
                const {data: d, error: u} = await this._getUser(t.access_token);
                if (u)
                    return this._returnResult({
                        data: {
                            user: null,
                            session: null
                        },
                        error: u
                    });
                i = {
                    access_token: t.access_token,
                    refresh_token: t.refresh_token,
                    user: d.user,
                    token_type: "bearer",
                    expires_in: r - a,
                    expires_at: r
                },
                await this._saveSession(i),
                await this._notifyAllSubscribers("SIGNED_IN", i)
            }
            return this._returnResult({
                data: {
                    user: i.user,
                    session: i
                },
                error: null
            })
        } catch (a) {
            if (Me(a))
                return this._returnResult({
                    data: {
                        session: null,
                        user: null
                    },
                    error: a
                });
            throw a
        }
    }

    async _refreshSession(t) {
        try {

                if (!t) {

                        throw d;

    async _getSessionFromURL(t, a) {
        try {
            if (!ka())
                throw new am("No browser detected.");
            if (t.error || t.error_description || t.error_code)
                throw new am(t.error_description || "Error in URL with unspecified error_description",{
                    error: t.error || "unspecified_error",
                    code: t.error_code || "unspecified_code"
                });
            switch (a) {
            case "implicit":
                if (this.flowType === "pkce")
                    throw new N5("Not a valid PKCE flow url.");
                break;
            case "pkce":
                if (this.flowType === "implicit")
                    throw new am("Not a valid implicit grant flow url.");
                break;
            default:
            }
            if (a === "pkce") {
                if (this._debug("#_initialize()", "begin", "is PKCE flow", !0),
                !t.code)
                    throw new N5("No code detected.");
                const {data: _, error: C} = await this._exchangeCodeForSession(t.code);
                if (C)
                    throw C;
                const P = new URL(window.location.href);
                return P.searchParams.delete("code"),
                window.history.replaceState(window.history.state, "", P.toString()),
                {
                    data: {
                        session: _.session,
                        redirectType: null
                    },
                    error: null
                }
            }
            const {provider_token: r, provider_refresh_token: n, access_token: i, refresh_token: c, expires_in: d, expires_at: u, token_type: h} = t;
            if (!i || !d || !c || !h)
                throw new am("No session defined in URL");
            const m = Math.round(Date.now() / 1e3)
              , f = parseInt(d);
            let x = m + f;
            u && (x = parseInt(u));
            const v = x - m;
            v * 1e3 <= yl && console.warn(`@supabase/gotrue-js: Session as retrieved from URL expires in ${v}s, should have been closer to ${f}s`);
            const j = x - f;
            m - j >= 120 ? console.warn("@supabase/gotrue-js: Session as retrieved from URL was issued over 120s ago, URL could be stale", j, x, m) : m - j < 0 && console.warn("@supabase/gotrue-js: Session as retrieved from URL was issued in the future? Check the device clock for skew", j, x, m);
            const {data: y, error: b} = await this._getUser(i);
            if (b)
                throw b;
            const N = {
                provider_token: r,
                provider_refresh_token: n,
                access_token: i,
                expires_in: f,
                expires_at: x,
                refresh_token: c,
                token_type: h,
                user: y.user
            };
            return window.location.hash = "",
            this._debug("#_getSessionFromURL()", "clearing window.location.hash"),
            this._returnResult({
                data: {
                    session: N,
                    redirectType: t.type
                },
                error: null
            })
        } catch (r) {
            if (Me(r))
                return this._returnResult({
                    data: {
                        session: null,
                        redirectType: null
                    },
                    error: r
                });
            throw r
        }
    }
    _isImplicitGrantCallback(t) {
        return typeof this.detectSessionInUrl == "function" ? this.detectSessionInUrl(new URL(window.location.href), t) : !!(t.access_token || t.error_description)
    }
    async _isPKCECallback(t) {
        const a = await Ao(this.storage, `${this.storageKey}-code-verifier`);
        return !!(t.code && a)
    }
    async signOut(t={
        scope: "global"
    }) {
        return await this.initializePromise,
        await this._acquireLock(this.lockAcquireTimeout, async () => await this._signOut(t))
    }
    async _signOut({scope: t}={
        scope: "global"
    }) {
        return await this._useSession(async a => {
            var r;
            const {data: n, error: i} = a;
            if (i && !Hb(i))
                return this._returnResult({
                    error: i
                });
            const c = (r = n.session) === null || r === void 0 ? void 0 : r.access_token;
            if (c) {
                const {error: d} = await this.admin.signOut(c, t);
                if (d && !(YJ(d) && (d.status === 404 || d.status === 401 || d.status === 403) || Hb(d)))
                    return this._returnResult({
                        error: d
                    })
            }
            return t !== "others" && (await this._removeSession(),
            await Ma(this.storage, `${this.storageKey}-code-verifier`)),
            this._returnResult({
                error: null
            })
        }
        )
    }
    onAuthStateChange(t) {
        const a = rQ()
          , r = {
            id: a,
            callback: t,
            unsubscribe: () => {
                this._debug("#unsubscribe()", "state change callback with id removed", a),
                this.stateChangeEmitters.delete(a)
            }
        };
        return this._debug("#onAuthStateChange()", "registered callback with id", a),
        this.stateChangeEmitters.set(a, r),
        (async () => (await this.initializePromise,
        await this._acquireLock(this.lockAcquireTimeout, async () => {
            this._emitInitialSession(a)
        }
        )))(),
        {
            data: {
                subscription: r
            }
        }
    }
    async _emitInitialSession(t) {
        return await this._useSession(async a => {
            var r, n;
            try {
                const {data: {session: i}, error: c} = a;
                if (c)
                    throw c;
                await ((r = this.stateChangeEmitters.get(t)) === null || r === void 0 ? void 0 : r.callback("INITIAL_SESSION", i)),
                this._debug("INITIAL_SESSION", "callback id", t, "session", i)

    async _recoverAndRefresh() {
        var t, a;

        this._debug(r, "begin");

                n !== null && await this._removeSession();

            }

            i) {

                } catch (c) {

    }
    async _callRefreshToken(t) {
        var a, r;
        if (!t)
            throw new _r;
        if (this.refreshingDeferred)
            return this.refreshingDeferred.promise;
        const n = `#_callRefreshToken(${t.substring(0, 5)}...)`;
        this._debug(n, "begin");
        try {
            this.refreshingDeferred = new hx;
            const {data: i, error: c} = await this._refreshAccessToken(t);
            if (c)
                throw c;
            if (!i.session)
                throw new _r;
            await this._saveSession(i.session),
            await this._notifyAllSubscribers("TOKEN_REFRESHED", i.session);
            const d = {
                data: i.session,
                error: null
            };
            return this.refreshingDeferred.resolve(d),
            d
        } catch (i) {
            if (this._debug(n, "error", i),
            Me(i)) {
                const c = {
                    data: null,
                    error: i
                };
                return qb(i) || await this._removeSession(),
                (a = this.refreshingDeferred) === null || a === void 0 || a.resolve(c),
                c
            }
            throw (r = this.refreshingDeferred) === null || r === void 0 || r.reject(i),
            i
        } finally {
            this.refreshingDeferred = null,
            this._debug(n, "end")
        }
    }
    async _notifyAllSubscribers(t, a, r=!0) {

                event: t,

              , c = Array.from(this.stateChangeEmitters.values()).map(async d => {
                try {

                } catch (u) {
                    i.push(u)
                }
            }
            );

            i.length > 0) {
                for (let d = 0; d < i.length; d += 1)
                    console.error(i[d]);
                throw i[0]
            }
        } finally {
            this._debug(n, "end")
        }
    }
    async _saveSession(t) {

          , r = a.user && a.user.__isUserNotAvailableProxy === !0;

        }
    }
    async _removeSession() {

    }
    _removeVisibilityChangedCallback() {

    async _startAutoRefresh() {

        t && typeof t == "object" && typeof t.unref == "function" ? t.unref() : typeof Deno < "u" && typeof Deno.unrefTimer == "function" && Deno.unrefTimer(t);

    }
    async _stopAutoRefresh() {
        this._debug("#_stopAutoRefresh()");

        this.autoRefreshTicker = null,
        t && clearInterval(t);

        a && clearTimeout(a)
    }
    async startAutoRefresh() {
        this._removeVisibilityChangedCallback(),
        await this._startAutoRefresh()
    }
    async stopAutoRefresh() {
        this._removeVisibilityChangedCallback(),
        await this._stopAutoRefresh()
    }
    async _autoRefreshTokenTick() {
        this._debug("#_autoRefreshTokenTick()", "begin");
        try {
            await this._acquireLock(0, async () => {
                try {
                    const t = Date.now();
                    try {
                        return await this._useSession(async a => {
                            const {data: {session: r}} = a;
                            if (!r || !r.refresh_token || !r.expires_at) {
                                this._debug("#_autoRefreshTokenTick()", "no session");
                                return
                            }
                            const n = Math.floor((r.expires_at * 1e3 - t) / yl);
                            this._debug("#_autoRefreshTokenTick()", `access token expires in ${n} ticks, a tick lasts ${yl}ms, refresh threshold is ${$j} ticks`),
                            n <= $j && await this._callRefreshToken(r.refresh_token)
                        }
                        )
                    } catch (a) {
                        console.error("Auto refresh tick failed with error. This is likely a transient error.", a)
                    }
                } finally {
                    this._debug("#_autoRefreshTokenTick()", "end")
                }
            }
            )
        } catch (t) {
            if (t.isAcquireTimeout || t instanceof U9)
                this._debug("auto refresh token tick lock not available");
            else
                throw t
        }
    }
    async _handleVisibilityChange() {
        if (this._debug("#_handleVisibilityChange()"),
        !ka() || !window?.addEventListener)
            return this.autoRefreshToken && this.startAutoRefresh(),
            !1;
        try {

    }
    async _onVisibilityChanged(t) {
        const a = `#_onVisibilityChanged(${t})`;
        this._debug(a, "visibilityState", document.visibilityState),
        document.visibilityState === "visible" ? (this.autoRefreshToken && this._startAutoRefresh(),
        t || (await this.initializePromise,
        await this._acquireLock(this.lockAcquireTimeout, async () => {
            if (document.visibilityState !== "visible") {
                this._debug(a, "acquired the lock to recover the session, but the browser visibilityState is no longer visible, aborting");
                return
            }
            await this._recoverAndRefresh()
        }
        ))) : document.visibilityState === "hidden" && this.autoRefreshToken && this._stopAutoRefresh()
    }
    async _getUrlForProvider(t, a, r) {
        const n = [`provider=${encodeURIComponent(a)}`];
        if (r?.redirectTo && n.push(`redirect_to=${encodeURIComponent(r.redirectTo)}`),
        r?.scopes && n.push(`scopes=${encodeURIComponent(r.scopes)}`),
        this.flowType === "pkce") {
            const [i,c] = await il(this.storage, this.storageKey)
              , d = new URLSearchParams({
                code_challenge: `${encodeURIComponent(i)}`,
                code_challenge_method: `${encodeURIComponent(c)}`
            });
            n.push(d.toString())
        }
        if (r?.queryParams) {
            const i = new URLSearchParams(r.queryParams);
            n.push(i.toString())
        }
        return r?.skipBrowserRedirect && n.push(`skip_http_redirect=${r.skipBrowserRedirect}`),
        `${t}?${n.join("&")}`
    }

    async _verify(t) {
        return this._acquireLock(this.lockAcquireTimeout, async () => {
            try {
                return await this._useSession(async a => {

                    if (i)

                        body: c,

                    });

                        data: null,

                        expires_at: Math.round(Date.now() / 1e3) + d.expires_in

    async _challenge(t) {
        return this._acquireLock(this.lockAcquireTimeout, async () => {
            try {
                return await this._useSession(async a => {
                    var r;
                    const {data: n, error: i} = a;
                    if (i)
                        return this._returnResult({
                            data: null,
                            error: i
                        });
                    const c = await Ie(this.fetch, "POST", `${this.url}/factors/${t.factorId}/challenge`, {
                        body: t,
                        headers: this.headers,
                        jwt: (r = n?.session) === null || r === void 0 ? void 0 : r.access_token
                    });
                    if (c.error)
                        return c;
                    const {data: d} = c;
                    if (d.type !== "webauthn")
                        return {
                            data: d,
                            error: null
                        };
                    switch (d.webauthn.type) {
                    case "create":
                        return {
                            data: Object.assign(Object.assign({}, d), {
                                webauthn: Object.assign(Object.assign({}, d.webauthn), {
                                    credential_options: Object.assign(Object.assign({}, d.webauthn.credential_options), {
                                        publicKey: RQ(d.webauthn.credential_options.publicKey)
                                    })
                                })
                            }),
                            error: null
                        };
                    case "request":
                        return {
                            data: Object.assign(Object.assign({}, d), {
                                webauthn: Object.assign(Object.assign({}, d.webauthn), {
                                    credential_options: Object.assign(Object.assign({}, d.webauthn.credential_options), {
                                        publicKey: LQ(d.webauthn.credential_options.publicKey)
                                    })
                                })
                            }),
                            error: null
                        }
                    }
                }
                )
            } catch (a) {
                if (Me(a))
                    return this._returnResult({
                        data: null,
                        error: a
                    });
                throw a
            }
        }
        )
    }
    async _challengeAndVerify(t) {
        const {data: a, error: r} = await this._challenge({
            factorId: t.factorId
        });
        return r ? this._returnResult({
            data: null,
            error: r
        }) : await this._verify({
            factorId: t.factorId,
            challengeId: a.id,
            code: t.code
        })
    }
    async _listFactors() {
        var t;
        const {data: {user: a}, error: r} = await this.getUser();
        if (r)
            return {
                data: null,
                error: r
            };
        const n = {
            all: [],
            phone: [],
            totp: [],
            webauthn: []
        };
        for (const i of (t = a?.factors) !== null && t !== void 0 ? t : [])
            n.all.push(i),
            i.status === "verified" && n[i.factor_type].push(i);
        return {
            data: n,
            error: null
        }
    }
    async _getAuthenticatorAssuranceLevel(t) {
        var a, r, n, i;
        if (t)

                v.aal && (j = v.aal);

                if (N)
                    return this._returnResult({

class Pee {
    constructor() {

        }
        ),

            this.subscribers.forEach(a => a(t))
        }

            this.publish(t),

        }

                        id: r,

                        message: h

                        message: f

        if (O.preventDefault(),
        !!t) {
            if (!i && !d) {
                _();

            }

                return
            }
            j(!0);

                const {data: k, error: D} = await he.auth.signInWithPassword({
                    email: i,
                    password: d
                });

                    we.error(D.message || "Login failed. Please check your credentials.");
                    return
                }
                if (!k.user) {
                    we.error("Login failed. Please try again.");
                    return
                }

                        we("Your account is awaiting admin approval."),
                        await he.auth.signOut(),
                        y();

                    }

                      , F = t === "admin" || t === "superadmin";
                    if (!z && R !== t) {
                        we.error(`This account is registered as a ${R}. Please go back and select "${R.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + R.slice(1)}" to log in.`, {
                            duration: 6e3
                        }),

                    }
                    if (R !== t && !F && we(`Logged in as ${R} — your assigned role has been applied.`),

        }
    }
      , c = u => {

        if (h) {
            const m = {
                ...h,
                status: h.status === "completed" ? "pending" : "completed",
                completedAt: h.status === "completed" ? void 0 : new Date().toISOString()
            };
            t({
                type: "UPDATE_TASK",
                payload: m
            }),
            m.status === "completed" && we.success(`Great job! You completed: ${h.title}`)
        }
    }

function Gre() {
    const {state: e, dispatch: t} = at()
      , [a,r] = A.useState(null)
      , n = e.medications.filter(y => y.isActive)
      , i = e.medicationLogs
      , c = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0]
      , d = i.filter(y => y.date === c)
      , u = y => {
        switch (y) {
        case "morning":
            return s.jsx(Qo, {
                "code-path": "src/pages/patient/PatientMedications.tsx:20:30",
                className: "w-5 h-5 text-warm-bronze"
            });
        case "afternoon":
            return s.jsx(bG, {
                "code-path": "src/pages/patient/PatientMedications.tsx:21:32",
                className: "w-5 h-5 text-gentle-coral"
            });
        case "evening":
            return s.jsx(Jn, {
                "code-path": "src/pages/patient/PatientMedications.tsx:22:30",
                className: "w-5 h-5 text-deep-slate"
            });
        default:
            return s.jsx(ca, {
                "code-path": "src/pages/patient/PatientMedications.tsx:23:23",
                className: "w-5 h-5 text-medium-gray"
            })
        }
    }
      , h = (y, b) => d.find(_ => _.medicationId === y && _.scheduledTime === b)?.status || "pending"
      , m = (y, b) => {
        const N = n.find(C => C.id === y);
        if (!N)
            return;
        const _ = {
            id: `log-${Date.now()}`,
            medicationId: y,
            patientId: e.patient?.id || "",
            medicationName: N.name,
            scheduledTime: b,
            takenTime: new Date().toISOString(),
            status: "taken",
            recordedBy: e.patient?.id || "",
            date: c
        };
        t({
            type: "ADD_MEDICATION_LOG",
            payload: _
        }),
        r(null)
    }
      , x = ( () => {
        const y = [];
        return n.forEach(b => {
            b.schedule.forEach(N => {
                const _ = parseInt(N.time.split(":")[0]);
                let C = "night";
                _ >= 6 && _ < 12 ? C = "morning" : _ >= 12 && _ < 17 ? C = "afternoon" : _ >= 17 && _ < 21 && (C = "evening"),
                y.push({
                    med: b,
                    time: N.time,
                    timeOfDay: C
                })
            }
            )
        }
        ),
        y.sort( (b, N) => b.time.localeCompare(N.time))
    }
    )()
      , v = d.filter(y => y.status === "taken").length
      , j = x.length - v;
    return s.jsxs("div", {
        "code-path": "src/pages/patient/PatientMedications.tsx:72:5",
        className: "space-y-6",
        children: [s.jsxs("div", {
            "code-path": "src/pages/patient/PatientMedications.tsx:74:7",
            className: "text-center",
            children: [s.jsx("h2", {
                "code-path": "src/pages/patient/PatientMedications.tsx:75:9",
                className: "text-2xl font-semibold text-charcoal mb-2",
                children: "My Medications"
            }), s.jsx("p", {
                "code-path": "src/pages/patient/PatientMedications.tsx:76:9",
                className: "text-medium-gray",
                children: "Keep track of your daily medications"
            })]
        }), s.jsxs("div", {
            "code-path": "src/pages/patient/PatientMedications.tsx:80:7",
            className: "grid grid-cols-2 gap-4",
            children: [s.jsxs(ge, {
                "code-path": "src/pages/patient/PatientMedications.tsx:81:9",
                className: "p-4 bg-soft-sage/30 border-0 text-center",
                children: [s.jsx(Ii, {
                    "code-path": "src/pages/patient/PatientMedications.tsx:82:11",
                    className: "w-8 h-8 text-soft-sage mx-auto mb-2"
                }), s.jsx("p", {
                    "code-path": "src/pages/patient/PatientMedications.tsx:83:11",
                    className: "text-3xl font-bold text-charcoal",
                    children: v
                }), s.jsx("p", {
                    "code-path": "src/pages/patient/PatientMedications.tsx:84:11",
                    className: "text-sm text-medium-gray",
                    children: "Taken Today"
                })]
            }), s.jsxs(ge, {
                "code-path": "src/pages/patient/PatientMedications.tsx:86:9",
                className: "p-4 bg-gentle-coral/10 border-0 text-center",

function Xre() {
    const {state: e, dispatch: t} = at()
      , [a,r] = A.useState(null)
      , [n,i] = A.useState("")
      , [c,d] = A.useState(!1)
      , [u,h] = A.useState(!1)
      , [m,f] = A.useState(!1)
      , x = e.moodEntries
      , v = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0]
      , j = x.find(C => C.timestamp.startsWith(v))
      , y = C => {
        r(C),
        d(!0)
    }
      , b = () => {
        if (!a || !e.patient)
            return;
        const C = {
            id: `mood-${Date.now()}`,
            patientId: e.patient.id,
            mood: a,
            intensity: 5,
            note: n || void 0,
            timeOfDay: ( () => {
                const P = new Date().getHours();
                return P < 12 ? "morning" : P < 17 ? "afternoon" : P < 21 ? "evening" : "night"
            }
            )(),
            timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
            recordedBy: e.patient.id
        };
        t({
            type: "ADD_MOOD_ENTRY",
            payload: C
        }),
        d(!1),
        f(!0),
        i(""),
        ["sad", "anxious", "angry", "confused"].includes(a) && setTimeout( () => h(!0), 500),
        setTimeout( () => f(!1), 3e3)
    }
      , N = C => Mu.find(T => T.type === C)?.icon || dh
      , _ = C => Mu.find(T => T.type === C)?.color || "text-medium-gray";
    return s.jsxs("div", {

                "code-path": "src/pages/patient/CarePartnerCheckin.tsx:199:15",
                className: "text-xs text-medium-gray mt-2 italic border-l-2 border-soft-taupe pl-3",
                children: ['"', i, '"']
            }, c))]
        })]
    })
}
function Jre() {

        ...iO
    })

        F: !1,
        G: !1
    })
      , v = e.currentUser?.id;
    A.useEffect( () => {
        r === "history" && j()
    }
    , [r]);
    const j = async () => {
        if (v) {
            m(!0);
            try {
                const {data: P, error: T} = await he.from("care_partner_checkins").select("*").eq("patient_id", v).order("check_in_date", {
                    ascending: !1
                }).limit(30);
                if (T)
                    throw T;
                u(P || [])
            } catch {
                we.error("Failed to load history")
            } finally {
                m(!1)
            }
        }
    }
      , y = P => T => a(E => ({
        ...E,

    }))

        ...T,

    }))

    }

        }

            return
        }

                throw P;

function rn() {
    const {state: e} = at();
    return A.useMemo( () => e.selectedPatientId && e.patients.find(t => t.patient.id === e.selectedPatientId) || null, [e.patients, e.selectedPatientId])

function S8() {

async function ene(e, t, a, r, n, i="") {
    const c = e.name.split(".").pop()
      , d = `${t}/${r}_${a}_${Date.now()}.${c}`
      , u = "patient-media"
      , {error: h} = await he.storage.from(u).upload(d, e, {
        upsert: !1,
        contentType: e.type
    });
    if (h)
        throw new Error(`Upload failed: ${h.message}`);
    const {data: m} = he.storage.from(u).getPublicUrl(d)
      , f = e.type.startsWith("video/") ? "video" : e.type.startsWith("image/") ? "image" : e.type.startsWith("audio/") ? "audio" : "document"
      , {data: x, error: v} = await he.from("media_uploads").insert({
        uploader_id: a,
        uploader_name: n,
        uploader_role: r,
        patient_id: t,
        file_url: m.publicUrl,
        file_type: f,
        file_name: e.name,
        file_size: e.size,
        caption: i
    }).select().single();
    if (v)
        throw new Error(`Failed to save media record: ${v.message}`);
    return x
}
async function tne(e) {
    const {data: t, error: a} = await he.from("media_uploads").select("*").eq("patient_id", e).order("created_at", {
        ascending: !1
    });
    return a ? (console.error("Error fetching media:", a),
    []) : t || []
}
async function ane(e, t) {
    const a = t.split("/patient-media/");
    a.length > 1 && await he.storage.from("patient-media").remove([a[1]]);
    const {error: r} = await he.from("media_uploads").delete().eq("id", e);
    if (r)
        throw new Error(`Failed to delete media: ${r.message}`)
}

async function one(e, t, a) {
    const r = e.tempPassword?.trim() || Math.random().toString(36).slice(-8) + "Mm1!"
      , {data: n, error: i} = await he.auth.signUp({
        email: e.email,
        password: r,
        options: {
            data: {
                first_name: e.firstName,
                last_name: e.lastName,
                role: "patient"
            }
        }
    });
    if (i)
        throw new Error(`Failed to create patient account: ${i.message}`);
    if (!n.user)
        throw new Error("No user returned from signup");
    const c = n.user.id
      , {error: d} = await he.from("profiles").upsert({
        id: c,
        email: e.email,
        first_name: e.firstName || "",
        last_name: e.lastName || "",
        role: "patient",
        phone: e.phone || null,
        must_change_password: !0
    });
    if (d)
        throw new Error(`Failed to create profile: ${d.message}`);
    const {data: u, error: h} = await he.from("patients").insert({
        id: c,
        preferred_name: e.preferredName || null,
        date_of_birth: e.dateOfBirth || null,
        diagnosis_date: e.diagnosisDate || null,
        dementia_stage: e.dementiaStage || null,
        location: e.location || null,
        address: e.address || null,
        affirmation: e.affirmation || null,
        emergency_contact_name: e.emergencyContact?.name || null,
        emergency_contact_relationship: e.emergencyContact?.relationship || null,
        emergency_contact_phone: e.emergencyContact?.phone || null,
        emergency_contact_email: e.emergencyContact?.email || null
    }).select().single();
    if (h || !u)
        throw new Error(`Failed to create patient record: ${h?.message}`);
    const {error: m} = await he.from("caregiver_patients").insert({
        caregiver_id: t,
        patient_id: c,
        relationship_type: a,
        is_primary: !0
    });
    if (m)
        throw new Error(`Failed to link caregiver: ${m.message}`);
    try {
        await he.auth.resetPasswordForEmail(e.email, {
            redirectTo: "https://www.memoriahelps.com"
        })
    } catch {
        console.warn("Invitation email could not be sent")
    }

        first_name: e.firstName,
        last_name: e.lastName,
        email: e.email,
        phone: e.phone,

    })
}
async function cne(e, t, a) {
    const {data: r} = await he.from("therapist_relationships").select("id, is_active").eq("therapist_id", t).eq("patient_id", e).maybeSingle();
    if (r) {
        const {error: n} = await he.from("therapist_relationships").update({
            is_active: !0
        }).eq("id", r.id);
        if (n)
            throw new Error(`Failed to reactivate relationship: ${n.message}`)
    } else {
        const {error: n} = await he.from("therapist_relationships").insert({
            therapist_id: t,
            patient_id: e,
            caregiver_id: a,
            relationship_type: "primary",
            is_active: !0
        });
        if (n)
            throw new Error(`Failed to assign therapist: ${n.message}`)
    }
}

      , T = {

    function E(ne, be) {
        return function(Se) {
            var se = [], Ue = -1, ke = 0, ht = ne.length, ct, Nt, tr;
            for (Se instanceof Date || (Se = new Date(+Se)); ++Ue < ht; )
                ne.charCodeAt(Ue) === 37 && (se.push(ne.slice(ke, Ue)),
                (Nt = CD[ct = ne.charAt(++Ue)]) != null ? ct = ne.charAt(++Ue) : Nt = ct === "e" ? " " : "0",
                (tr = be[ct]) && (ct = tr(Se, Nt)),
                se.push(ct),
                ke = Ue + 1);
            return se.push(ne.slice(ke, Ue)),
            se.join("")
        }
    }
    function O(ne, be) {
        return function(Se) {
            var se = Ru(1900, void 0, 1), Ue = k(se, ne, Se += "", 0), ke, ht;
            if (Ue != Se.length)
                return null;
            if ("Q"in se)
                return new Date(se.Q);
            if ("s"in se)
                return new Date(se.s * 1e3 + ("L"in se ? se.L : 0));
            if (be && !("Z"in se) && (se.Z = 0),
            "p"in se && (se.H = se.H % 12 + se.p * 12),
            se.m === void 0 && (se.m = "q"in se ? se.q : 0),
            "V"in se) {
                if (se.V < 1 || se.V > 53)
                    return null;
                "w"in se || (se.w = 1),
                "Z"in se ? (ke = g2(Ru(se.y, 0, 1)),
                ht = ke.getUTCDay(),
                ke = ht > 4 || ht === 0 ? Ng.ceil(ke) : Ng(ke),
                ke = Ex.offset(ke, (se.V - 1) * 7),
                se.y = ke.getUTCFullYear(),
                se.m = ke.getUTCMonth(),
                se.d = ke.getUTCDate() + (se.w + 6) % 7) : (ke = m2(Ru(se.y, 0, 1)),
                ht = ke.getDay(),
                ke = ht > 4 || ht === 0 ? Sg.ceil(ke) : Sg(ke),
                ke = Cp.offset(ke, (se.V - 1) * 7),
                se.y = ke.getFullYear(),
                se.m = ke.getMonth(),
                se.d = ke.getDate() + (se.w + 6) % 7)
            } else
                ("W"in se || "U"in se) && ("w"in se || (se.w = "u"in se ? se.u % 7 : "W"in se ? 1 : 0),
                ht = "Z"in se ? g2(Ru(se.y, 0, 1)).getUTCDay() : m2(Ru(se.y, 0, 1)).getDay(),
                se.m = 0,
                se.d = "W"in se ? (se.w + 6) % 7 + se.W * 7 - (ht + 5) % 7 : se.w + se.U * 7 - (ht + 6) % 7);
            return "Z"in se ? (se.H += se.Z / 100 | 0,
            se.M += se.Z % 100,
            g2(se)) : m2(se)
        }
    }
    function k(ne, be, Se, se) {
        for (var Ue = 0, ke = be.length, ht = Se.length, ct, Nt; Ue < ke; ) {
            if (se >= ht)
                return -1;
            if (ct = be.charCodeAt(Ue++),
            ct === 37) {
                if (ct = be.charAt(Ue++),
                Nt = T[ct in CD ? be.charAt(Ue++) : ct],
                !Nt || (se = Nt(ne, Se, se)) < 0)
                    return -1
            } else if (ct != Se.charCodeAt(se++))
                return -1
        }
        return se
    }
    function D(ne, be, Se) {
        var se = h.exec(be.slice(Se));
        return se ? (ne.p = m.get(se[0].toLowerCase()),
        Se + se[0].length) : -1
    }
    function I(ne, be, Se) {
        var se = v.exec(be.slice(Se));
        return se ? (ne.w = j.get(se[0].toLowerCase()),
        Se + se[0].length) : -1
    }
    function R(ne, be, Se) {
        var se = f.exec(be.slice(Se));
        return se ? (ne.w = x.get(se[0].toLowerCase()),
        Se + se[0].length) : -1
    }
    function z(ne, be, Se) {
        var se = N.exec(be.slice(Se));
        return se ? (ne.m = _.get(se[0].toLowerCase()),
        Se + se[0].length) : -1
    }
    function F(ne, be, Se) {
        var se = y.exec(be.slice(Se));
        return se ? (ne.m = b.get(se[0].toLowerCase()),
        Se + se[0].length) : -1
    }
    function q(ne, be, Se) {
        return k(ne, t, be, Se)
    }
    function K(ne, be, Se) {
        return k(ne, a, be, Se)
    }
    function $(ne, be, Se) {
        return k(ne, r, be, Se)
    }
    function H(ne) {
        return c[ne.getDay()]
    }
    function Y(ne) {
        return i[ne.getDay()]
    }
    function W(ne) {
        return u[ne.getMonth()]
    }
    function Z(ne) {
        return d[ne.getMonth()]
    }
    function U(ne) {
        return n[+(ne.getHours() >= 12)]
    }
    function V(ne) {
        return 1 + ~~(ne.getMonth() / 3)
    }
    function Q(ne) {
        return c[ne.getUTCDay()]
    }
    function ce(ne) {
        return i[ne.getUTCDay()]
    }
    function pe(ne) {
        return u[ne.getUTCMonth()]
    }
    function ve(ne) {
        return d[ne.getUTCMonth()]
    }
    function fe(ne) {
        return n[+(ne.getUTCHours() >= 12)]
    }
    function ye(ne) {
        return 1 + ~~(ne.getUTCMonth() / 3)
    }
    return {
        format: function(ne) {
            var be = E(ne += "", C);
            return be.toString = function() {
                return ne
            }
            ,
            be
        },
        parse: function(ne) {
            var be = O(ne += "", !1);
            return be.toString = function() {
                return ne
            }
            ,
            be
        },
        utcFormat: function(ne) {
            var be = E(ne += "", P);
            return be.toString = function() {
                return ne
            }
            ,
            be
        },
        utcParse: function(ne) {
            var be = O(ne += "", !0);
            return be.toString = function() {
                return ne
            }
            ,
            be
        }
    }
}

function NI() {

      , t = er;
    function a(r) {
        if (r != null && !isNaN(r = +r))
            return t((Sp(e, r, 1) - 1) / (e.length - 1))
    }

        if (!arguments.length)
            return e.slice();
        e = [];
        for (let n of r)
            n != null && !isNaN(n = +n) && e.push(n);

    }

        a) : t
    }

    }

function Jz(e) {
    const t = A.useRef({
        value: e,
        previous: e
    });
    return A.useMemo( () => (t.current.value !== e && (t.current.previous = t.current.value,
    t.current.value = e),
    t.current.previous), [e])
}
function Qz(e) {
    const [t,a] = A.useState(void 0);
    return Wa( () => {
        if (e) {
            a({
                width: e.offsetWidth,
                height: e.offsetHeight
            });
            const r = new ResizeObserver(n => {
                if (!Array.isArray(n) || !n.length)
                    return;
                const i = n[0];
                let c, d;
                if ("borderBoxSize"in i) {
                    const u = i.borderBoxSize
                      , h = Array.isArray(u) ? u[0] : u;
                    c = h.inlineSize,
                    d = h.blockSize
                } else
                    c = e.offsetWidth,
                    d = e.offsetHeight;
                a({
                    width: c,
                    height: d
                })
            }
            );
            return r.observe(e, {
                box: "border-box"
            }),
            () => r.unobserve(e)
        } else
            a(void 0)
    }
    , [e]),
    t
}

function oL() {
    const {state: e} = at()
      , t = e.patient
      , a = e.moodEntries
      , r = e.behaviorLogs
      , n = e.safetyAlerts
      , i = e.adlAssessments
      , c = e.caregiverStatus
      , d = e.nutritionLogs
      , [u,h] = A.useState(null)
      , [m,f] = A.useState(!1)
      , x = n.filter(D => D.category === "red" && !D.isResolved)
      , v = n.filter(D => D.category === "yellow" && !D.isResolved)
      , j = n.filter(D => D.category === "green")
      , y = i[i.length - 1]
      , b = i[i.length - 2]
      , N = D => D ? D.dressing + D.eating + D.bathing + D.toileting + D.transferring + D.continence : 0
      , _ = N(y)

function uL({onNavigate: e}) {
    const [t,a] = A.useState({
        totalCaregivers: 0,
        totalPatients: 0,
        totalTherapists: 0,
        pendingApprovals: 0,
        newUsersThisWeek: 0
    })
      , [r,n] = A.useState([])
      , [i,c] = A.useState(!0);
    A.useEffect( () => {
        d()
    }
    , []);
    const d = async () => {
        try {
            const [m,f,x,v,j] = await Promise.all([he.from("profiles").select("*", {
                count: "exact",
                head: !0
            }).eq("role", "caregiver"), he.from("profiles").select("*", {
                count: "exact",
                head: !0
            }).eq("role", "patient"), he.from("profiles").select("*", {
                count: "exact",
                head: !0
            }).eq("role", "therapist"), he.from("profiles").select("*", {
                count: "exact",
                head: !0
            }).eq("role", "pending"), he.from("profiles").select("id, first_name, last_name, email, role, created_at").order("created_at", {
                ascending: !1
            }).limit(5)])
              , y = new Date;
            y.setDate(y.getDate() - 7);
            const {count: b} = await he.from("profiles").select("*", {
                count: "exact",
                head: !0
            }).gte("created_at", y.toISOString());
            a({
                totalCaregivers: m.count || 0,
                totalPatients: f.count || 0,
                totalTherapists: x.count || 0,
                pendingApprovals: v.count || 0,
                newUsersThisWeek: b || 0
            }),
            n(j.data || [])
        } catch (m) {
            console.error("Error loading admin stats:", m)
        } finally {
            c(!1)
        }
    }
      , u = m => {
        switch (m) {
        case "caregiver":
            return "bg-warm-bronze/10 text-warm-bronze";
        case "patient":
            return "bg-soft-sage/20 text-soft-sage";
        case "therapist":
            return "bg-calm-blue/20 text-calm-blue";
        case "admin":
            return "bg-deep-bronze/10 text-deep-bronze";
        default:
            return "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700"
        }
    }
      , h = [{
        label: "Total Caregivers",
        value: t.totalCaregivers,
        icon: uh,
        color: "bg-warm-bronze/10",
        iconColor: "text-warm-bronze",
        action: () => e("caregivers")

const sU = [{
    value: "caregiver",
    label: "Caregiver",
    color: "bg-warm-bronze/10 text-warm-bronze"
}, {
    value: "therapist",
    label: "Therapist",
    color: "bg-calm-blue/10 text-blue-700"
}, {
    value: "patient",
    label: "Patient",
    color: "bg-soft-sage/20 text-green-700"

    value: "admin",
    label: "Admin",
    color: "bg-deep-bronze/10 text-deep-bronze"

    label: "Pending",
    color: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700"

  , iU = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/
  , W2e = /^[\+]?[(]?[0-9]{1,4}[)]?[-\s\.\/0-9]{6,14}$/
  , hL = /^[A-Za-z\s\-']+$/
  , Y2e = /^(?=.*[a-z])(?=.*[A-Z])(?=.*\d)(?=.*[!@#$%^&*()_+\-=\[\]{};':"\\|,.<>\/?]).{8,}$/;
function K2e({onClose: e, onAdded: t}) {
    const [a,r] = A.useState({
        firstName: "",
        lastName: "",
        email: "",
        phone: "",
        password: "",
        role: "caregiver",
        organization: ""
    })
      , [n,i] = A.useState({})
      , [c,d] = A.useState(!1)
      , [u,h] = A.useState(!1)

      , x = C => {
        const P = {};
        return C.firstName.trim() ? hL.test(C.firstName.trim()) || (P.firstName = "Letters only") : P.firstName = "Required",
        C.lastName.trim() ? hL.test(C.lastName.trim()) || (P.lastName = "Letters only") : P.lastName = "Required",
        C.email.trim() ? iU.test(C.email.trim()) || (P.email = "Invalid email") : P.email = "Required",
        C.phone.trim() && !W2e.test(C.phone.trim()) && (P.phone = "Invalid phone"),
        C.password ? Y2e.test(C.password) || (P.password = "Min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special char") : P.password = "Required",
        C.organization.trim() || (P.organization = "Required"),

        c()
    }

        r(!0);

                ascending: !1
            });
            if (h)
                throw h;

            if (m.length === 0) {
                t([]),
                r(!1);

            }

              , v = [...new Set((f || []).map(T => T.caregiver_id))]

              , y = [...new Set([...v, ...j])]

                data: []
            }

                }
            }

            console.error("AdminPatients error:", u)

function Q2e({onCountChange: e}) {
    const [t,a] = A.useState([])
      , [r,n] = A.useState(!0)
      , [i,c] = A.useState(null)
      , [d,u] = A.useState({});
    A.useEffect( () => {
        h()
    }
    , []);
    const h = async () => {
        n(!0);
        try {
            const {data: x, error: v} = await he.from("profiles").select("id, email, first_name, last_name, created_at").eq("role", "pending").order("created_at", {
                ascending: !0
            });
            if (v)
                throw v;
            const j = x || [];
            a(j),
            e(j.length);
            const y = {};
            j.forEach(b => {
                y[b.id] = "caregiver"
            }
            ),
            u(y)
        } catch (x) {
            console.error("Error loading pending users:", x)
        } finally {
            n(!1)
        }
    }
      , m = async x => {
        const v = d[x.id] || "caregiver";
        c(x.id);
        try {
            const {error: j} = await he.from("profiles").update({
                role: v
            }).eq("id", x.id);
            if (j)
                throw j;
            const {error: y} = await he.auth.resetPasswordForEmail(x.email, {
                redirectTo: `${window.location.origin}`
            });
            y && console.warn("Approval email failed to send:", y.message),
            await h(),
            alert(`✅ ${x.first_name} ${x.last_name} approved as ${v}. A notification email has been sent to ${x.email}.`)
        } catch (j) {
            console.error("Approve error:", j),
            alert("Error approving user: " + j.message)
        } finally {
            c(null)
        }
    }
      , f = async x => {
        if (confirm(`Reject and delete the account for ${x.first_name} ${x.last_name} (${x.email})?

This cannot be undone.`)) {
            c(x.id);
            try {
                const {error: v} = await he.from("profiles").delete().eq("id", x.id);
                if (v)
                    throw v;
                await h(),
                alert(`Account for ${x.email} has been rejected and removed.`)
            } catch (v) {
                console.error("Reject error:", v),
                alert("Error rejecting user: " + v.message)
            } finally {
                c(null)
            }
        }
    }
    ;
    return r ? s.jsx("div", {
        "code-path": "src/pages/admin/AdminPendingApprovals.tsx:117:7",
        className: "flex items-center justify-center py-20",

function tje({role: e, onClose: t, onAdded: a}) {

        !r.firstName || !r.lastName || !r.email || !r.password) {
            alert("All fields are required");
            return
        }
        c(!0);
        try {
            const {data: x, error: v} = await he.auth.signUp({
                email: r.email.trim().toLowerCase(),
                password: r.password,
                options: {
                    data: {
                        first_name: r.firstName,
                        last_name: r.lastName,
                        role: e
                    }
                }
            });
            if (v)
                throw v;
            if (!x.user)
                throw new Error("No user returned");
            await he.from("profiles").upsert({
                id: x.user.id,
                email: r.email.trim().toLowerCase(),
                first_name: r.firstName.trim(),
                last_name: r.lastName.trim(),

function aje() {
    const {state: e, dispatch: t} = at()
      , [a,r] = A.useState(!1)
      , [n,i] = A.useState(!0)
      , [c,d] = A.useState("overview")
      , [u,h] = A.useState(0);
    A.useEffect( () => {
        m()
    }
    , []),
    A.useEffect( () => {
        a && f()
    }
    , [a]);
    const m = async () => {
        try {
            if (e.currentUser?.id === "u1" && e.currentUser?.role === "admin") {
                r(!0),
                i(!1);
                return
            }
            const {data: {user: y}} = await he.auth.getUser();
            if (!y) {
                t({
                    type: "LOGOUT"
                });
                return
            }
            const {data: b} = await he.from("profiles").select("role").eq("id", y.id).maybeSingle();
            b?.role === "admin" ? r(!0) : t({
                type: "LOGOUT"
            })
        } catch {
            t({
                type: "LOGOUT"
            })
        } finally {
            i(!1)
        }
    }
      , f = async () => {
        const {count: y} = await he.from("profiles").select("*", {
            count: "exact",
            head: !0
        }).eq("role", "pending");
        h(y || 0)
    }
      , x = async () => {
        await he.auth.signOut(),
        t({
            type: "LOGOUT"
        })
    }

function rje() {
    const {state: e, dispatch: t} = at()
      , [a,r] = A.useState("dashboard")
      , [n,i] = A.useState(null)
      , [c,d] = A.useState([])
      , [u,h] = A.useState([])
      , [m,f] = A.useState(!0)
      , [x,v] = A.useState(!1)
      , [j,y] = A.useState("")
      , [b,N] = A.useState("")
      , [_,C] = A.useState("")
      , [P,T] = A.useState("")
      , [E,O] = A.useState(!1);
    A.useEffect( () => {
        k()
    }
    , []);
    const k = async () => {
        f(!0);
        try {
            const [{data: q},{data: K}] = await Promise.all([he.from("profiles").select("role"), he.from("superadmins").select("id, profile_id, username, display_name, is_active, created_at, profiles(email)").order("created_at")]);
            if (q) {
                const H = Y => q.filter(W => W.role === Y).length;
                i({
                    total_users: q.length,
                    caregivers: H("caregiver"),
                    therapists: H("therapist"),
                    patients: H("patient"),
                    admins: H("admin"),
                    superadmins: H("superadmin"),
                    pending: H("pending")
                })
            }
            K && d(K.map(H => ({
                ...H,
                email: H.profiles?.email
            })));
            const {data: $} = await he.from("profiles").select("id, email, first_name, last_name, created_at").eq("role", "admin").order("created_at", {
                ascending: !1
            });
            h($ || [])
        } catch (q) {
            we.error("Failed to load data: " + q.message)
        } finally {
            f(!1)
        }
    }
      , D = async () => {
        if (!j || !b || !_ || !P) {
            we.error("All fields are required");
            return
        }
        O(!0);
        try {
            const {data: q, error: K} = await he.auth.signUp({
                email: j.trim().toLowerCase(),
                password: P,
                options: {
                    data: {
                        first_name: b,
                        last_name: _,
                        role: "admin"
                    }
                }
            });
            if (K)
                throw K;
            if (!q.user)
                throw new Error("No user returned");
            await he.from("profiles").upsert({
                id: q.user.id,
                email: j.trim().toLowerCase(),
                first_name: b,
                last_name: _,
                role: "admin",
                must_change_password: !0
            }),
            we.success(`Admin account created for ${b} ${_}`),
            v(!1),
            y(""),
            N(""),
            C(""),
            T(""),
            k()
        } catch (q) {
            we.error("Failed to create admin: " + q.message)
        } finally {
            O(!1)
        }
    }
      , I = async (q, K) => {
        if (confirm(`Revoke admin access for ${K}? They will become a regular caregiver.`))
            try {
                await he.from("profiles").update({
                    role: "caregiver"
                }).eq("id", q),
                we.success(`${K}'s admin access revoked`),
                k()
            } catch ($) {
                we.error("Failed: " + $.message)
            }
    }
      , R = async () => {
        await he.auth.signOut(),
        t({
            type: "LOGOUT"
        })
    }
